case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS V LLC VS. TIMOTHY J. KORZEP et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 15064007) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS V LLC
